package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `if strings.HasPrefix(s, p) { s = strings.TrimPrefix(s, p) }`
type CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixModel
}

type CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixService struct {
    repo *CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefix(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStringsHasprefixThenTrimprefixDTO) error {
    focus := "strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    if strings.HasPrefix(input, "pre") {
        input = strings.TrimPrefix(input, "pre")
    }
    strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix_positive := map[string]int{"strings": 1, "hasprefix": 2, "then": 3, "trimprefix": 4}
    strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    strings_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = strings_positive_0
    hasprefix_positive_1 := strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix_positive["hasprefix"] + len(input)
    _ = hasprefix_positive_1
    then_positive_2 := strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix_positive["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_positive_2
    trimprefix_positive_3 := strings_hasprefix_then_trimprefix_positive["trimprefix"] + len(input)
    _ = trimprefix_positive_3
    return nil
}
